offer: For freelancer using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, delayed payments cause cash flow gaps. We automate recurring invoices instead of manual invoicing through QuickBooks.
problem: Delayed payments due to manual invoicing processes.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for freelancers seeking invoicing help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about invoicing workflows
DM outreach to freelancers with a demo video
Participate in community forums sharing invoicing tools
try_it: Let users try payment tracking and overdue notice reminders on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
